acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was operated in the data-dependent mode
cleavage agent: digested overnight at 37°C with sequencing-grade modified trypsin
collision energy: HCD fragmentation at the collision energy of 38%
instrument: Thermo Fisher LTQ-Orbitrap Elite mass spectrometer
ionization type: the eluent was sprayed with an NSI source
labeling: the outer surface proteins of C. sinensis were labeled with biotin
